codeReview.summary: The feature successfully establishes Playwright as the canonical e2e foundation with scoped discovery, deterministic backend/frontend startup on ports 3100/3101, and actionable diagnostics/reporting. I found one non-blocking hygiene issue around generated artifact tracking.

issues.description: Playwright is configured to write diagnostics/reports under tests/artifacts/playwright (playwright.config.ts:19-23), but .gitignore does not ignore that generated path, causing recurring untracked artifacts after local e2e runs and noisy working trees.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Mission environment documentation is stale for Playwright backend startup flags: library docs still say COVALT_GENERATE_TS=1, but this feature intentionally uses COVALT_GENERATE_TS=0 in Playwright webServer command.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/environment.md:18 lists COVALT_GENERATE_TS=1, while playwright.config.ts:32 in commit 1f22ef1 runs backend with COVALT_GENERATE_TS=0.

summary: Reviewed worker session 9679ce67-83e2-467b-a005-b00e83d17483 and commit 1f22ef1 for playwright-foundation-and-discovery. Implementation meets feature requirements with one non-blocking artifact-ignore hygiene issue; overall status is pass.
